name: causal-halting
description: A Codex skill, low-cost prompt guard, and experimental checker for detecting prediction-feedback loops in halting-style reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze prediction-feedback loops in halting-style reasoning.
interface.longDescription: Causal Halting packages a Codex skill, low-cost UserPromptSubmit context guard, CHC-0 reference notes, and an experimental checker for separating structural prediction-feedback cycles from ordinary semantic undecidability.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this agent loop with CHC-0.
Check this halting-style graph for feedback.
